title: My Characters
subtitle: Manage your FFXIV characters and verification status.

add.title: Add Character
add.subtitle: Choose how you'd like to verify your character ownership

xivauth.title: Import from XIVAuth
xivauth.subtitle: Automatically import your verified characters from XIVAuth. You need to have your XIVAuth account linked.

manual.title: Verify Manually
manual.subtitle: Add a character using the Lodestone. Requires placing a verification code on your character profile.

step1.title: Manual Verification
step1.subtitle: Enter your Lodestone profile URL or character ID

input.label: Lodestone Profile URL or Character ID
input.hint: You can paste either the full Lodestone URL or just the character ID number

step1.help_line: {label} Go to the {lodestone}, search for your character, and copy the URL from your character's profile page.

step2.title: Verify Character Ownership
step2.subtitle: Add the verification code to your Lodestone profile
instructions: 3.Edit your profile and paste the code anywhere in your character profile text

toast_success.title: Code Copied
toast_success.description: The verification code has been copied to your clipboard.

toast_error.title: Copy Failed
toast_error.description: Could not copy the verification code.

toast_taken.title: Character Already Registered
toast_taken.description: This character is already registered. If this is your character and you did not register it please contact support.

step3.title: Checking Your Profile
step3.subtitle: Please wait while we verify your Lodestone profile...

success.title: Character Verified!
success.subtitle: Your character has been successfully verified and added to your account.

fail.title: Verification Failed
fail.subtitle: We couldn't find the verification code on your Lodestone profile.
common_issues: The verification code wasn't added to your profile
Profile changes haven't updated yet (try waiting a few minutes)
The code was modified or has extra spaces

errors.invalid_token: Verification code does not match. Please try again.
errors.invalid_lodestone_id: Invalid Lodestone ID. Please enter a valid character ID or Lodestone URL.
errors.character_not_found: Character not found. Please check the ID and try again.
errors.lodestone_error: Could not retrieve character information. Please try again later.
errors.parse_error: Could not parse character information. Please try again later.

step1.title: Fetching Characters
step1.subtitle: Loading your verified characters from XIVAuth. This may take a few minutes.

step2.title: Select Character to Import
step2.subtitle: Choose the character you'd like to import from XIVAuth.

step3.title: Importing Character
step3.subtitle: Importing your character from XIVAuth. This may take a few minutes.

success.title: Character Imported!
success.subtitle: Your character has been successfully imported from XIVAuth.

errors.xivauth_not_linked: Looks like you haven't linked your XIVAuth account yet. Please link your account to import your characters.
errors.xivauth_token_invalid: We couldn't authorize you with XIVAuth. Please try again or contact support.
errors.xivauth_character_already_claimed: This character is already registered. If this is your character, please contact support.

sync.conflict_description_one: {characters} is already registered. If this is your character, please contact support.
sync.conflict_description_many: {characters} are already registered. If these are your characters, please contact support.

card.unclaim_description: This removes the character from your account. You can reclaim it later if needed.
